title: hieracium vogesiacum subsp. alatum
intro: Hieracium vogesiacum subsp. alatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hieracium vogesiacum subsp. alatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
